notes: DummyJSON exposes NO bulk endpoints (no 207, no per-item array, no persistence), so the 207 / per-item-status / DB-count-delta assertions cannot run against it. DummyJSON is left 100% untouched. The bulk test targets a separate, purpose-built, local, air-gapped, spec-conformant bulk endpoint (tools/bulk_target/app.py). The harness namespaces each agent's rows with an X-Bulk-Scope header (run_id:agent:batch) so the four agents run in parallel against one DB without colliding.
